# 5/3/1 Routine - YYYY-MM-DD

Use this as the output shape for a generated four-week routine. Replace all placeholder text with concrete prescriptions, exact accessory sets and reps, and explicit superset pairings where they exist. Normal weeks use one paired superset plus one standalone accessory. Deload week uses only two easy assistance movements.

## Summary

### Sync Naming

- Folder Name: 5/3/1 - YYYY-MM-DD Block
- Routine Title Format: W[week]D[day]: [Main Lift 1 Short]/[Main Lift 2 Short]
- Short Lift Labels: Squat, Deadlift, Bench, OHP

### Routine Overview

| Week | Day | Main Lift 1 | Main Lift 2 | Accessory 1a | Accessory 1b | Accessory 2a | Accessory 2b |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [week] | [day] | [main lift 1 label] | [main lift 2 label] | [accessory 1a] | [accessory 1b] | [accessory 2a] | [accessory 2b] |

### Muscle Group Frequency

| Muscle Group | Days Worked | Total Exposures |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [group] | [count] | [count] |

Use the same column order as structure.csv for the overview table.
Count muscle-group frequency using direct programmed work in the routine.
Use these summary groups: Back, Shoulders, Chest, Legs, Core, Arms.
Use the routine date in the title as the block date for the sync naming section.

## Week 1

### Day 1

Main Lift 1
- [Lift] 5/3/1 - [set 1], [set 2], [set 3]

Main Lift 2
- [Lift] FSL [5x5 or 3x5] - [percentage] ([weight])

Accessories
Superset A
- [Accessory 1a] - [sets] x [reps]
- [Accessory 1b] - [sets] x [reps]

Accessory B
- [Accessory 2a] - [sets] x [reps]
